'''Cavern Monsters''' were [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] [[Species/Legends|beasts]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ventooine/Legends|Ventooine]]. They were very aggressive creatures and were prone to attack any other creature in range. During the reign of the [[Satab]]s, Cavern Monsters were used as tools of execution and punishment for their enemies. When [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] came to [[Ventooine/Legends|Ventooine]] some time during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], he was almost killed by a Cavern Monster that was released upon him in a [[Mining/Legends|mine]], where it was secretly kept by the [[Satab (individual)|Satab]]. However, he was able to kill the creature when he caused a stalactite to fall from a cave and impale the monster.
